# Models

In this page, all model list defined in QAtlas.jl is shown. **62 models** have `@register` entries, derived from `src/*_registry.jl`.

## Legend

| Icon | Level | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| 🟣 | Universality-corroborated | Universality class confirmed and linked to a known universality hub |
| 🟢 | Corroborated at P | Result confirmed at a specific parameter point |
| 🔵 | Coherent | Internally consistent; no independent cross-check yet |
| ⚪ | Cited-only | Literature result cited; not independently reproduced |
| 🟠 | Uncorroborated-but-feasible | Claimed but not yet verified |

The **Universality** column shows the class detected from `CriticalExponents` /
`CentralCharge` claims. `—` means no such claim is registered (not necessarily unknown).
